prompt: Generate typography for the the phrase 'Freedom' in vertical Chinese-style layout from first image, but with English characters using textures from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate an image displaying the word 'Freedom' using a vertical layout. Each letter of 'Freedom' should be stacked vertically, centered on the image, similar to the Chinese characters' arrangement in image 1. The text 'Freedom' should appear in a crisp, clean, bold white font, replicating the style and solid white color of the 'Canon' logo text in image 2. The background should be a solid red, matching the vibrant red background seen in image 2.
objects: Letters of "Freedom" centered on the image
Vibrant red background color (matching reference image 2)
